prompt_text:
### Demographics: 70-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 13 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Pancreatic Cancer (post-treatment surveillance)
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Current smoker (20 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~25 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 54.1 kg; Height 163.2 cm; BMI 20.3 kg/m²; Blood pressure 130/80 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.3%; 9 months ago 9.5%; 6 months ago 9.0%; 3 months ago 8.5%; current 7.3%), FPG (12 months ago 239mg/dL; 9 months ago 253mg/dL; 6 months ago 252mg/dL; 3 months ago 182mg/dL; current 156mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 54.8kg; 9 months ago 55.3kg; 6 months ago 57.1kg; 3 months ago 55.8kg; current 54.1kg), Height (12 months ago 163.2cm; 9 months ago 163.2cm; 6 months ago 163.2cm; 3 months ago 163.2cm; current 163.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 21.0kg/m²; current 20.3kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 130mmHg; 9 months ago 130mmHg; 6 months ago 129mmHg; 3 months ago 131mmHg; current 130mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 78mmHg; 9 months ago 76mmHg; 6 months ago 78mmHg; 3 months ago 80mmHg; current 80mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 134U/L; 9 months ago 126U/L; 6 months ago 132U/L; 3 months ago 135U/L; current 128U/L), AST (12 months ago 69U/L; 9 months ago 64U/L; 6 months ago 70U/L; 3 months ago 64U/L; current 65U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.4mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.3mg/dL; current 1.2mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 40mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 36mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 34mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; current 36mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 128mg/g; 9 months ago 138mg/g; 6 months ago 200mg/g; 3 months ago 215mg/g; current 127mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 99mg/dL; 9 months ago 96mg/dL; 6 months ago 92mg/dL; 3 months ago 94mg/dL; current 95mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 45mg/dL; 9 months ago 47mg/dL; 6 months ago 44mg/dL; 3 months ago 48mg/dL; current 46mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 145mg/dL; 9 months ago 146mg/dL; 6 months ago 146mg/dL; 3 months ago 141mg/dL; current 153mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 12.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.2g/dL; 6 months ago 11.0g/dL; 3 months ago 11.0g/dL; current 11.5g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.91 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
